description: Seed dictionary for MMSS ontology patterns. Designed for easy import into abstract-mind-lab PostgreSQL tables and reuse in runtime mapping.

phase_patterns.notes: Entry impulse, initialization, trigger point; from silence or void into the first structured event. Includes Genesis Core and L1 Core seeding.
Hold state, equilibrium, fixation plateau; section where parameters remain stable and form a reference baseline. Ensures narrative fidelity and phase integrity.
Directional growth, acceleration, vector shift; classic build-up behavior in parameters, texture and narrative tension. Includes kinetic singularity and exponential rise.

keywords: переход от одного звука к другому
phase_patterns.notes: Transition, branching, switching path; points where flow commutes between distinct sections, modes or contexts. Includes G-Inversion and temporal inversion mechanics.
Layering, merge, integration, convolution; fusion of multiple domains, tracks or motifs into a single compound block. Includes meta-fusion and cross-contamination protocols.
Decay, release, cooling, dissipation; phase after climax or dense section, where material gradually relaxes toward stillness. Includes thermal death and spectral decay.
Convergence, finalization, crystallization; sections where narrative and sound condense into a clear, highlighted core statement. Reaches aesthetic singularity and zero-point impact.

domain_patterns.notes: Temporal pulse, beat structure, groove motion.
Rule system, schema logic, operator/process structure.
Mathematical data, numerical computations, algorithms, and mathematical operations.
